recommendations.title: Minuscule 2: Mandibles from Far Away
recommendations.overview: When the first snow falls in the valley, it is urgent to prepare its reserves for the winter. Alas, during the operation, a small ladybug is trapped in a box - to the Caribbean. One solution: reform the shock team.

recommendations.title: Auntie Edna
recommendations.overview: Taking place during the events of Incredibles 2, Edna Mode babysits Jack-Jack.

recommendations.title: Doogal
recommendations.overview: An adorable candy-loving mutt goes on a mission to save the world.
recommendations.director: Jean Duval, Dave Borthwick, Frank Passingham

recommendations.title: One Piece Film Red
recommendations.overview: A new adventure begins for Luffy and his crew when mysterious pop superstar Uta unveils her identity — and launches a misguided plan for world peace.

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: Incredibles 2
recommendations.overview: Elastigirl springs into action to save the day, while Mr. Incredible faces his greatest challenge yet – taking care of the problems of his three children.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, TV Movie, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb team up with the Avengers to save the world from Dr. Doofenshmirtz and a group of dangerous supervillains.

recommendations.title: Foodfight!
recommendations.overview: The evil Brand X joins a supermarket that becomes a city after closing time.

recommendations.title: The Rain Children
recommendations.overview: There is a world with two towns that are big enemies: Pyross and Hydross.

recommendations.title: Gnome Alone
recommendations.overview: When Chloe discovers that her new home's garden gnomes are not what they seem, she must decide between the pursuit of a desired high school life and taking up the fight against the Troggs.
